ab: izua u dukiusi ti kapi, timadju ru draudraw kemacu ta nemanga.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Kapi，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Kapi, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: ka kitulutul amen, na kisedjam timadju ta na dukiusi a inpic, siquliqulip kata qadupu.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: puita, pudrusa, putjelu, aza salasaladj pukaui a pasedjam ta nemanga tjaimadju.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: izua damidami a kakudan nimadju, ru kisedjam ta nemanga sa ika pacikel anga.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: kavililjanga a mapuljat ika sa pasedjam ta nemanga tjaimadju.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: izua tu ita qadaw, na maciul amen vaik a kivanvan.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: ka i kadjalanan, sa mabinziu ti kapi, ljakua madraudraw kemacu timadju ta sidjuadjuas.
ch: 路途中，kapi想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Kapi wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: na kisedjam timadju ta salasaladj ta sidjuadjuas, ljakua maitucu temevela a mapuljat tjaimadju, ika nakemacu a ken tauta.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: ti kapi qemauqaung ta latjakan, matjalaw timadju qivu, akumaya ika nu pasedjaman na ken ta sidjuadjuas!!
ch: kapi急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!!
en: Kapi burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: tjumaljang na salasaladj timadju, lja ika sun na rukacut, saka nu pasedjaman sun ta nemanga, ika sun na pacikel.
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: kamaljia magaku, medjama sema gaku ti kapi, aza kinisedjam ta salasaladj a nemanga pinacikel anga penuljat ta dukiusi.
ch: 隔天上學，kapi很早就到學校了，Kapi把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Kapi arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: ti kapi kipaqaljay ta dukiusi, sa qivu nu tjaivililj tjara kemacu ta niaken a nemanga, masalu tjanumun ka tjaisangas pukaui a pasedjam ta nemanga tja nuaken.
ch: kapi向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Kapi apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
